active_goal: Improve MemoryOS Lite v3 into a benchmark-usable Letta-style agent memory system for LongMemEval and LoCoMo, without demo-only phase completion, without hiding case-level regressions, and without enabling the v3 kernel by default.

prior_fail_repaired.evidence: r3 summary reports source_miss_judge_pass for conv-26_qa_002, conv-26_qa_003, conv-26_qa_004, and conv-26_qa_005.
baseline_coverage is present; missing, extra, and duplicate rows block with full_chain_gate_status=blocked_baseline_mismatch.
diagnostic classes evidence_retrieved_not_selected, evidence_selected_not_rendered, and evidence_rendered_not_answer_evidence map to context_missing_evidence.

review_eval_decision.reason: Phase 17 changed only the explicit LoCoMo repair-smoke path. A LoCoMo 10 fixed-slice full-chain LLM answer/judge baseline plus explicit kernel repair-smoke rerun is sufficient for this diagnostic repair-measurement ACK. Same-slice repair smoke is not promotion evidence.

longmemeval.reason: Default v3 retrieval, context composition, and answer behavior were not changed outside explicit LoCoMo repair-smoke mode.

locomo.reason: Fixed-slice LoCoMo baseline and explicit repair-smoke rerun were required and completed with LLM answer and judge.
